message:
fix(tests): skip dataset tests when beads.db unavailable in CI

The beads.db SQLite database is a runtime file not committed to git,
so it won't exist in CI environments. Tests that depend on it now
skip gracefully with an informative message instead of failing.

- Add beads.db existence check in scan_dataset()
- Add beads_rust_available() helper function
- Update 7 tests to skip when dataset unavailable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
